command:
echo "=== Fully stop + disable .201 cloudflared replica ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 \
  "sudo systemctl stop cloudflared && sudo systemctl disable cloudflared && echo '.201 stopped+disabled'"

echo "=== Confirm .191 cloudflared is the only one running ==="
systemctl is-active cloudflared
echo "--- wait 15s for Cloudflare to drop .201 from pool ---"
sleep 15

echo "=== Send real Telegram message (now ONLY .191 can serve) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"FINAL TEST via .191 only - Sakura reply: I am online"}' >/dev/null
echo "sent, waiting 45s for batch+model+reply..."
sleep 45
echo "=== gateway.log new lines ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15
REMOTE
